title: Recorded press conference / interview with four Arab journalists
dateDisplay: December 2015 (approximate; reported in project research record; needs verification)
dateStatus: Needs review — event and publication dates listed as 'Needs review' in candidate file; a December 2015 date range has been reported in the project research workbook but is not confirmed in the candidate files available for this audit; the specific date should be treated as approximate until primary source verification is completed
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
evidenceSummary: A recorded press conference or interview with four Arab journalists, provisionally associated with a December 2015 date range reported in the project research workbook (candidate file lists event and publication dates as 'Needs review'). The format involves multiple journalists simultaneously and is distinct from the single-interviewer broadcast format of S2013-002, S2015-005, and S2015-006. The names of the journalists, the distribution channel, the primary recording source, and the date have not been confirmed through primary source verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass (which covered S2015-005 only).
publicResearchNote: This press conference is retained as a Phase 1 corpus candidate because it is a recorded session with multiple Arab journalists, which is a distinct format from the other items in the candidate set. Date, journalist identities, distribution channel, and primary recording all require verification. The December 2015 date range should be confirmed or corrected against primary sources before adoption. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass.
